title: Add Stage 1 regression test suite
goal: Lock the canonical Stage 1 baseline with automated tests covering storage normalization, markdown round-trip, next-id generation, migration idempotence, and the core file-backed goal command flows.
context: Wave C is the final closeout wave for Stage 1 and is intentionally limited to verification, documentation alignment, and runner resilience.

The Stage 1 checklist explicitly calls for regression tests covering legacy JSON normalization, goal file round-trip, next-id generation, migration idempotence, goal add, goal close, goal archive, and fine writing canonical records with derived_from.
Wave A and Wave B already established the canonical file-backed Finis model, so Wave C should protect that baseline rather than broadening architecture.
requirements: Add automated tests for legacy JSON normalization into the canonical goal schema.
Add automated tests for canonical goal markdown round-trip behavior.
Add automated tests for next_goal_id() based on existing FINIS_###.md files.
Add automated tests for migration idempotence so repeated migration does not duplicate goal files.
Add automated tests for azq goal add, azq goal close, and azq goal archive against file-backed storage.
Keep the tests focused on storage invariants and CLI-visible behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The repository has an automated regression suite for the highest-risk Stage 1 storage and command flows.
The tests prove the canonical file-backed goal model behaves deterministically.
Stage 1 behavior is locked by tests rather than manual inspection alone.
suggested_commit_message: add stage 1 regression tests for canonical finis storage

title: Align Stage 1 documentation with canonical file-backed storage
goal: Make the operator-facing docs teach the live Stage 1 truth by describing data/finis/goals/ as canonical and data/finis/goals.json as legacy migration input only.
context: Wave C closeout explicitly requires AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md and README.md to stop presenting goals.json as the active truth.
The Stage 1 checklist says the docs must clarify that file-backed goals are canonical and JSON is migration-only legacy input.
This closeout wave exists to freeze Stage 1 before Formam begins, so documentation drift must be removed now.
requirements: Refactor AZQ_BOOTSTRAP.md so it no longer presents data/finis/goals.json as the active write target.
Refactor README.md so the project overview reflects the canonical file-backed goal model.
Remove references that describe data/finis/goals.json as the active system of record.
Explicitly define data/finis/goals/ as the canonical system of record for Finis goals.
Align terminology around title versus goal where needed.
acceptance_criteria: The docs no longer teach the pre-Stage-1 Finis storage model.
A new operator can read the docs and understand that canonical goals live as one file per goal.
data/finis/goals.json is described only as legacy migration input, never as active truth.
suggested_commit_message: align stage 1 docs with canonical finis goal storage

title: Add graceful Stage 1 closeout behavior to the runner ritual
goal: Make the runner and ritual script treat an empty remaining backlog as successful Stage 1 completion by printing a final report and a clear completion message instead of exiting with an error.
context: Wave C closeout requires runner resilience and an explicit Stage 1 completion signal when no tasks remain.
The current ritual script still surfaces a traceback when choose_next_task() raises ValueError for no remaining tasks.
The fix should stay narrow and compatible with the existing Stage 1 runner flow rather than introducing a new orchestration model.
requirements: Add a graceful no-tasks-remaining branch to the Stage 1 task runner.
When no tasks remain, emit the task status report instead of returning a non-zero exit code.
Print an explicit Stage 1 Complete message when the backlog is exhausted.
Update run_wave_b_step.sh so the ritual still prints the report and completion signal cleanly.
Keep the change focused on runner resilience and closeout polish only.
acceptance_criteria: Running the ritual after all Wave C work is complete exits successfully.
The operator receives a final report and a clear Stage 1 Complete status message.
No-tasks-remaining is treated as a successful terminal state rather than as an error traceback.
suggested_commit_message: add graceful stage 1 complete exit to codex runner
